# Test Fixtures for Test Execution Reporting

This directory contains test fixtures for the Test Execution Reporting feature.

## Structure

- `test-outputs/` - Sample test execution outputs from various frameworks
- `jira-tasks/` - Sample Jira task content for language detection testing
- `test-files/` - Sample test files with different framework syntaxes
- `reports/` - Sample generated markdown reports

## Usage

These fixtures are used by unit tests and property-based tests to verify the correctness of the Test Execution Reporting components.
